terms.termsofUseandPrivacyPolicy.text1: We intend to collect and use the following personal information for the provision of the BioStar Air Partner Portal services and membership. Please read carefully before deciding whether to agree or not.
terms.termsofUseandPrivacyPolicy.text2: ‣ Collection and Usage of Personal Information
terms.termsofUseandPrivacyPolicy.text3:
※ An account which has not been accessed for over a year is converted to a dormant account and its information is stored separately.
※ The information for an account which has been converted to dormant will be completely deleted after 1 year from the time of conversion.
terms.termsofUseandPrivacyPolicy.text4: ※ You have the right to refuse consent to the processing of personal information as outlined above. However, if you refuse to agree, you cannot use the BioStar Air Partner Portal service provided by Suprema.
auth.carousel1.title:
World’s leading biometrics,
NOW in the cloud.
auth.carousel1.description: The new BioStar Air is only access control solution that natively connects the world's most advanced biometric readers to the cloud.
auth.carousel2.title:
Industry’s widest
range of credentials.
auth.carousel2.description: BioStar Air supports a full range of credentials while enabling hands-free, remote unlocking, and API-based integrations for maximum flexibility.
auth.carousel3.title:
Effortless access control,
from anywhere.
auth.carousel3.description: BioStar Air empowers space owners to rethink access as a driver of new business models while enjoying the luxury of managing their spaces remotely, from anywhere in the world.
